title: Con su música a otra parte
original_title: Con su Música a otra parte
overview: A young balladeer raised in the United States returns to Colombia to continue her career. Her plans do not align with her mother's, a famous singer of tropical music, and their clash is inevitable. The girl flees her home and frequents the spaces of musicians and artists with revolutionary tendencies.

trailers.title: En cine nos vemos - Con su música para otra parte - Camila Loboguerrero, 1984.
